sections_cited: Section 35 of the Sindh Local Government Act

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C.P. NO.D-6712/2015 Date Order with signature of Judge Hearing/priority 03.11.2015 ChmR. Asfandyar Khan Kharal, advocate. Mr. Saifullah, AAG == Petitioner’s nomination papers were rejected on the ground that his proposer and seconder were enrolled in Ward No.2 whereas the petitioner is contesting elections from Ward No.3. Learned counsel for the petitioner contended that petitioner is not contesting election from Ward No.3 although he has filed his nomination papers for Ward No.2 of UC-16. On a query, learned counsel states that petitioner is not enrolled in Ward No.2 as well. The petitioner’s counsel referred to Section 35 of the Sindh Local Government Act, 2013, which is not relevant as it relates to elections of council. In our view, the petitioner is not entitled to contest election. Therefore, this petition is dismissed. CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE sharif
